title: Contact
heading: Contact Us
intro: Get in touch with BarkinMad Studios for app support, feedback, testing, or business enquiries.

hero.alt: Professional workspace inviting project discussions and contact with BarkinMad Studios

sections.heading: Support
paragraphs: For help with any BarkinMad Studios app or game, please contact support@barkinmad.studio.
When contacting support, please include the app name, your device model, iOS version, and a short description of the issue.

sections.heading: Feedback
paragraphs: Feedback is welcome for all BarkinMad Studios apps and games, including ZXSnake, ZXBrick, ZXSpace, and GameOfDarts.
Suggestions, bug reports, gameplay ideas, and feature requests help improve future updates.

sections.heading: Testing
paragraphs: BarkinMad Studios may occasionally invite testers to try upcoming apps, games, and new features before public release.
If you are interested in testing future iPhone or iPad apps, please get in touch by email.

sections.heading: Business Enquiries
paragraphs: For general business enquiries, collaboration requests, or app-related questions, please contact support@barkinmad.studio.
